Privacy Policy

Last Updated: 05-Dec-2024

This Privacy Policy describes the policies of Roberto Vicario,

Email: robertovicario.com@gmail.com,

regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of your information when you use our website (https://www.robertovicario.com) (the “Service”).

By accessing or using the Service, you consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of your information in accordance with this Privacy Policy. If you do not consent, please do not access or use the Service.

We may modify this Privacy Policy at any time without prior notice and will post the revised Privacy Policy on the Service. The revised Policy will be effective 180 days from when it is posted, and your continued access or use of the Service after this time will constitute your acceptance of the revised Privacy Policy. We recommend that you periodically review this page.

Information We Collect

We collect and process the following personal information about you:

  • Name
  • Email
  • Mobile
  • Working Company

How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect for the following purposes:

  • Support

If we need to use your information for any other purpose, we will ask for your consent and use it only with your permission, unless required by law.

Retention Of Your Information

We will retain your personal information for 90 days to 2 years after user accounts remain idle or as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy.

Certain information may be retained for longer periods for legal, regulatory, fraud prevention, or other legitimate reasons. Residual anonymous and aggregate information may be stored indefinitely.

Your Rights

Depending on applicable laws, you may have the following rights:

  • Access and rectify or erase your personal data
  • Receive a copy of your personal data
  • Restrict or object to the processing of your data
  • Request data portability
  • Withdraw consent for data processing
  • Lodge a complaint with a statutory authority

To exercise these rights, contact us at robertovicario.com@gmail.com. We will respond in accordance with applicable laws.

Please note that if you withdraw consent or restrict data processing, certain services may no longer be available to you.

Cookies and Tracking Technologies

For more information on how we use cookies and tracking technologies, please refer to our Cookie Policy.

Security

The security of your information is important to us. We use reasonable security measures to prevent loss, misuse, or unauthorized alteration of your information. However, no security system is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee the absolute security of your information. Any transmission of data is at your own risk.

Third-Party Links and Services

Our Service may contain links to third-party websites or services that are not operated by us. This Privacy Policy does not apply to third-party websites or services.

We recommend reviewing the privacy policies of any third-party sites you visit. We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or policies of third-party websites or services.

Grievance / Data Protection Officer

If you have any questions or concerns regarding the processing of your information, please contact our Grievance Officer:

Roberto Vicario Email: robertovicario.com@gmail.com

We will address your concerns in accordance with applicable laws.
